evidence: Envelope schema_version activation verified on merged main. Gates: npm run build / check / test all exit 0 (block-version-stamp.test.ts 9/9 + two pre-existing pass-through assertions updated to the convergent behavior). Live substrate: pi-context update resynced all 17 installed schemas (dryRun previewed, then applied, read-schema confirmed the property); unstamped-block read demonstrated backward-compat; this verification's own write is the live stamp demonstration (tasks.json/verification.json envelopes carry schema_version 1.0.1 after closure). Fold-locus determination recorded: the stamp lands generically in writeTypedFile, self-gated on the schema declaring the property + carrying a version.

criteria_results.criterion: Every block schema envelope declares optional schema_version; the relaxation is that one property only
criteria_results.evidence: 17 samples schemas gained exactly one optional property (session-notes already declared it); additionalProperties:false intact envelope+items; git diff shows +4 lines per schema

criteria_results.criterion: Write path stamps the envelope to the current schema version on every block write — stamped, not passed through
criteria_results.evidence: writeTypedFile stamps post-ctx-stamp/pre-validate; covers whole-block writes AND the append/update/upsert wrapper funnel (tested); stale claims overwritten after migration (tested); live: the closure writes stamp tasks.json + verification.json

criteria_results.criterion: Read hook fires on the envelope and routes through validateBlockWithMigrationForDir
criteria_results.evidence: read-gate tests exercise real readBlock against stamped fixtures (migrate + throw cells); live read of stamped blocks post-closure exercises the hook via the CLI

criteria_results.criterion: Version-gap behavior is migrate AND throw at both gates, write-throw leaving the file byte-unchanged
criteria_results.evidence: block-version-stamp.test.ts four cells: read-migrate, read-throw (no chain), write-migrate (persisted at current), write-throw with byte-identical file asserted

criteria_results.criterion: The property reaches already-installed substrates via install/update
criteria_results.evidence: pi-context update resynced 17 installed schemas on .context (backed up first); read-schema --schemaName tasks --path properties.schema_version returns the property from the installed body
